text:
----- Original Message ----- 
 > ----------------
 > From: "Peter Avalos" <pavalos@theshell.com>
 > To: <freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org>, <stado_slonov@mail.ru>
 > Cc:  
 > Subject: Re: misc/25249: cc compiler not work
 > Date: Wed, 28 Feb 2001 13:37:58 -0600
 > 
 >  Which version of socket.h do you have, and when did you last update your
 >  source tree?
 >  
 >  --Pete
 >  --------------
 > *      @(#)socket.h    8.4 (Berkeley) 2/21/94
 >  * $FreeBSD: src/sys/sys/socket.h,v 1.49 2001/02/17 03:49:24 bde Exp $
 >  */
 > -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  15621 17 oaa 06:49 /usr/src/sys/sys/socket.h
 > ---------------
 > the machine with FreeBSD 5.0 cur. rebooting every 12 hours :-( itself ...
 > -----
 > root@sys /usr/src/include# last
 > reboot           ~                         thu   8 mar 05:00
 > reboot           ~                         wed   5 mar 05:05
 > wtmp begins  thu   1 mar 12:35:19 2001
 > root@sys /usr/src/include#
 > -----
